title: Cuneiform Tablet #0179: Old Babylonian Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
